scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=duyet-home
scripts.cf:deploy: bun run --env-file=../../.env.production --env-file=../../.env.production.local build && bunx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=duyet-home --commit-dirty=true
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: mv ../../.env.local ../../.env.local.bak 2>/dev/null || true && bun run --env-file=../../.env.production --env-file=../../.env.production.local build && bunx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=duyet-home --commit-dirty=true && mv ../../.env.local.bak ../../.env.local 2>/dev/null || true
